item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode, treated the prompt as a routine scheduling request, and produced a duty roster with dates and assignees. It did not fire triage, use action count as a trigger, or over-methodize the task."}
